variants.title: AS2130
variants.option1Value: FilterFinder FF212827B | Replaces the Filtrec AS2130
variants.description: The FF212827B is our FilterFinder Approved replacement to the Filtrec AS2130. Our element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of the original Filtrec filter, ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with our  media and a durable design, the FF212827B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. With FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: 0, Efficiency 1: 0, Efficiency 2: 0, Outer Diameter: 0.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 0.0 mm, Length: 0.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 0 bar, Seal Material: 0, Temperature Range: 0, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 0, Flow Direction: 0, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 0, Seal: 0
